title: Emergency & Safety
description: Emergency & Safety Stay Informed In the event of an emergency, an Emergency Operations Center and Joint Information Center would be activated to coordinate the emergency response and oversee the development and dissemination of public information. SRNL employs highly qualified staff who participate in routine drills, training opportunities, and exercises to ensure emergency preparedness. SRNL...
text:
In the event of an emergency, an Emergency Operations Center and Joint Information Center would be activated to coordinate the emergency response and oversee the development and dissemination of public information. SRNL employs highly qualified staff who participate in routine drills, training opportunities, and exercises to ensure emergency preparedness.
SRNL is deeply committed to maintaining the highest standards of safety for its employees, the community, and the environment. Our safety protocols are rigorously enforced and routinely updated based on the latest industry standards and best practices.
